name: Anhui Wanwei Updated High-Tech Material Industry Co.,Ltd
summary: Anhui Wanwei Updated High-Tech Material Industry Co.,Ltd provides chemicals, fibers, and new and building materials. The company offers polyvinyl alcohol (PVA), high-strength and high-modulus PVA fibers, PVA water-soluble fibers, PVB resins, PVA optical films, redispersible latex powder, vinyl acetate, VAE emulsion, alcohol, polyester chips, methyl acetate, cement clinker, and cement, as well as other PVA-related derivative, intermediate, and by-products. Its products are used primarily in textile, food, medicine, construction, wood processing, papermaking, printing, agriculture, metallurgy, electronics, environmental protection, and other industries. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Chaohu, China.
